description: Address code review feedback: fix z-index/position overlap between chat widget and ad-block banner, conditionally render FloatingChatWidget when Botpress URL is not set, and replace Date.now() IDs with incrementing counter.
steps: In FloatingChatWidget.tsx, move the chat button to bottom-24 right-6 z-50 so it sits above SoftAdBlockMessage. Set the chat panel to bottom-[7.5rem] right-6 z-50.
In FloatingChatWidget.tsx ChatPanel component, add a useRef counter and replace Date.now() ID generation with incrementing counter using 'msg-' prefix.
In app/layout.tsx, conditionally render FloatingChatWidget only when NEXT_PUBLIC_BOTPRESS_BOT_URL is not set. Use {!process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_BOTPRESS_BOT_URL && <FloatingChatWidget />}
Run npm run build to verify no compilation errors.
acceptance_criteria: Chat button is positioned at bottom-24 right-6 z-50, not overlapping with SoftAdBlockMessage at bottom-4 right-4
Chat panel uses z-50 and bottom-[7.5rem]
FloatingChatWidget only renders when NEXT_PUBLIC_BOTPRESS_BOT_URL env var is falsy
Message IDs use incrementing counter instead of Date.now()
npm run build passes without errors
verification: Run npm run build and confirm it passes
Grep FloatingChatWidget.tsx for z-50 and bottom-24
Grep layout.tsx for conditional render of FloatingChatWidget
